content: Firebase 12.14.0 (published 2026-05-28). Modular v9+ auth: all functions are free functions taking auth as first param. Imports: getAuth, createUserWithEmailAndPassword, signInWithEmailAndPassword, signInAnonymously, onAuthStateChanged, setPersistence, browserLocalPersistence, browserSessionPersistence, inMemoryPersistence from 'firebase/auth'. setPersistence(auth, browserLocalPersistence) is default for web (persists across refresh). signInAnonymously(auth) creates anonymous user. user.isAnonymous flag. linkWithCredential(auth.currentUser, credential) upgrades anonymous to permanent. getApps() check prevents duplicate init: !getApps().length ? initializeApp(config) : getApp(). CRITICAL GOTCHA: Email enumeration protection enabled by default on new Firebase projects (post Sept 2023) blocks anonymous→email linking via linkWithCredential - must disable in console or use alternative flow.
